title: stelis regia
intro: Stelis regia, also known as the royal orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Stelis regia has been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for centuries to promote overall health and well-being.
